title: FloristryWarehouse Velvet Ribbon 63mm Wide x 9m Emerald Green
features: A 63mm (2.5 inch) wide velvet fabric ribbon with a wired edge
Velvet finish on one side, plain on the reverse
A perfect Christmas ribbon for decoration or as a wedding ribbon or for floristry and a variety of craft uses
description: A 63mm (2.5 inch) wide velvet fabric ribbon with a wired edge. Full 9 metre (10yd) roll. Velvet finish on one side, plain on the reverse. A perfect Christmas ribbon for decoration or as a wedding ribbon or for floristry and a variety of craft uses. Lightly wired edges retain desired shape. Available in Burgundy Red, Emerald Green and Purple. Actual colour may vary a little from the photo depending on your monitor settings. All sizes are approximate.
